summary: License System Testing Complete - Central License Server WhatsApp notification hooks, expiry scheduler, and Python web backend license stub all working correctly. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: License tab renders correctly with all expected elements.
seed_data_creation: Test licenses created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: License system fully tested. Central License Server runs on PORT=7100 (standalone Node.js, not supervisor-managed). NOTIFY_WA_API_KEY intentionally not set in test env - notifier silently skips. Python web backend /api/license/info and /api/license/heartbeat return MOCKED stub responses (WEB-DEPLOYMENT) - this is BY DESIGN for web deployment.

central_license_server_tests: POST /api/admin/licenses - create license with notification hook - PASS
POST /api/admin/licenses/:id/test-notify kind=revoked - PASS (skipped: NOTIFY_WA_API_KEY not set)
Verify notified_7day NOT persisted when API key missing - PASS
PUT /api/admin/licenses/:id expires_at extended - notification flags reset - PASS
Test license cleanup from database.json - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Verify with server button clicked - PASS (toast shown)
Copy button clicked - PASS (clipboard error expected in headless)

mocked_apis.note: Python /api/license/info and /api/license/heartbeat return hardcoded WEB-DEPLOYMENT stub - BY DESIGN for web deployment

whatsapp_notification_hooks.on_license_create: ✓ Fires notifyActivated (skipped when no API key)
whatsapp_notification_hooks.on_license_revoke: ✓ Fires notifyRevoked (skipped when no API key)
whatsapp_notification_hooks.on_license_reactivate: ✓ Fires notifyActivated (skipped when no API key)

expiry_scheduler.flag_persistence_logic: ✓ Does NOT persist notified_7day when NOTIFY_WA_API_KEY missing (allows retry once configured)
expiry_scheduler.schedule: First scan 60s after boot, then every 6h + daily 09:00
